parameters.query:
WITH owner AS (
  SELECT id, telegram_chat_id FROM inbox.users WHERE role = 'owner' AND status = 'active' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 1
), period AS (
  SELECT current_date - 7 AS period_start, current_date AS period_end
), new_items AS (
  SELECT item.id, item.received_at, knowledge.title, knowledge.summary, project.name AS project, category.name AS category
  FROM owner
  JOIN inbox.inbox_items item ON item.user_id = owner.id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.knowledge_items knowledge ON knowledge.inbox_item_id = item.id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.projects project ON project.id = knowledge.project_id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.categories category ON category.id = knowledge.category_id
  CROSS JOIN period
  WHERE item.received_at >= period.period_start::timestamptz
), review_queue AS (
  SELECT item.id
  FROM owner
  JOIN inbox.inbox_items item ON item.user_id = owner.id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.knowledge_items knowledge ON knowledge.inbox_item_id = item.id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.projects project ON project.id = knowledge.project_id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.categories category ON category.id = knowledge.category_id
  WHERE coalesce(knowledge.is_archived, false) = false
    AND (item.status <> 'ready' OR knowledge.id IS NULL OR project.name = 'Other' OR category.name = 'Other' OR item.raw_payload #>> '{extraction,complete}' = 'false')
), top_projects AS (
  SELECT coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('name', project, 'count', count) ORDER BY count DESC, project), '[]'::jsonb) AS items
  FROM (SELECT coalesce(project, 'Other') AS project, count(*) AS count FROM new_items GROUP BY coalesce(project, 'Other') ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 5) ranked
), top_categories AS (
  SELECT coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('name', category, 'count', count) ORDER BY count DESC, category), '[]'::jsonb) AS items
  FROM (SELECT coalesce(category, 'Other') AS category, count(*) AS count FROM new_items GROUP BY coalesce(category, 'Other') ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 5) ranked
), latest_items AS (
  SELECT coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('short_id', left(id::text, 8), 'title', coalesce(title, 'Без назви'), 'project', coalesce(project, 'Other')) ORDER BY received_at DESC), '[]'::jsonb) AS items
  FROM (SELECT * FROM new_items ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 5) latest
), relation_stats AS (
  SELECT coalesce(jsonb_object_agg(relation_type, count), '{}'::jsonb) AS counts
  FROM (
    SELECT relation.relation_type, count(*) AS count
    FROM inbox.relations relation CROSS JOIN period
    WHERE relation.created_at >= period.period_start::timestamptz
    GROUP BY relation.relation_type
  ) grouped
), actions AS (
  SELECT coalesce(jsonb_agg(action ORDER BY created_at DESC), '[]'::jsonb) AS items
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT action.value AS action, knowledge.created_at
    FROM owner
    JOIN inbox.knowledge_items knowledge ON knowledge.user_id = owner.id
    CROSS JOIN period
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements_text(knowledge.next_actions) action(value)
    WHERE knowledge.created_at >= period.period_start::timestamptz
    ORDER BY knowledge.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 5
  ) limited
), duplicates AS (
  SELECT count(*) AS count
  FROM inbox.relations relation
  JOIN inbox.knowledge_items source ON source.id = relation.source_item_id
  JOIN owner ON owner.id = source.user_id
  WHERE relation.relation_type = 'duplicate'
), storage AS (
  SELECT coalesce(max(current_bytes), 0) AS current_bytes, coalesce(max(threshold_bytes), 7000000000) AS threshold_bytes
  FROM owner LEFT JOIN inbox.storage_thresholds threshold ON threshold.user_id = owner.id AND threshold.storage_provider = 'backblaze_b2'
)
SELECT owner.id::text AS user_id, owner.telegram_chat_id::text AS chat_id,
  period.period_start::text AS period_start, period.period_end::text AS period_end,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM new_items) AS new_count,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM inbox.inbox_items item WHERE item.user_id = owner.id AND item.status = 'ready') AS ready_total,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM review_queue) AS review_count, duplicates.count AS duplicate_count,
  top_projects.items AS top_projects, top_categories.items AS top_categories, latest_items.items AS latest_items,
  relation_stats.counts AS relation_counts, actions.items AS next_actions,
  storage.current_bytes, storage.threshold_bytes
FROM owner CROSS JOIN period CROSS JOIN top_projects CROSS JOIN top_categories CROSS JOIN latest_items CROSS JOIN relation_stats CROSS JOIN actions CROSS JOIN duplicates CROSS JOIN storage;

INSERT INTO inbox.digest_runs (user_id, digest_type, period_start, period_end, delivered_at, metrics)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'weekly', $2::date, $3::date, now(), jsonb_build_object('new_count', $4::integer, 'review_count', $5::integer, 'duplicate_count', $6::integer, 'current_bytes', $7::bigint))
ON CONFLICT (user_id, digest_type, period_start, period_end) DO UPDATE SET delivered_at = EXCLUDED.delivered_at, metrics = EXCLUDED.metrics
RETURNING id::text AS digest_run_id, delivered_at;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Load Weekly Digest').first().json.user_id, $('Load Weekly Digest').first().json.period_start, $('Load Weekly Digest').first().json.period_end, $('Load Weekly Digest').first().json.new_count, $('Load Weekly Digest').first().json.review_count, $('Load Weekly Digest').first().json.duplicate_count, $('Load Weekly Digest').first().json.current_bytes ] }}
